meaning: n.恩巴恩迪语(中非共和国和北扎伊尔的一种班图
examples: The Ngbandi's Yakoma group live in the south of this city of 700, 000, where as the Sara live in the north.
Nine ethnic groups - the Mbum, Sara, Banda, Gbaya, Bantu, Pygmies, Oubanguiens, Ngbandi, Nzakara Zande - inhabit this country of 2.3 million people.
